characters.name: Angie Bladell
characters.description: Angela BladellBorn 11 September 1985Full nameAngela BladellStatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationCashier atWeiner Taco(formerly)CriminalNicknameAngieFamilyEdith Bladell(mother)Patty Bladell(daughter)Kitty Bladell(deceased unborn daughter)RelationshipGordy Greer(ex-boyfriend, groomer)Unknown Men(one-night-stands)Unknown Men(ex-boyfriends)Bob Armstrong(boyfriend)VictimsUnnamed Drug Dealer (by proxy)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two14 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed bySarah ColonnaAngela "Angie" Bladellis a main character onInsatiable. She is played bySarah Colonna. Criminal Angie Bladell is the mother toPatty Bladell. When she was 16, she had Patty, but she wasn't a good mother as she neglected Patty during her childhood and became a hardcore alcoholic. After Patty lost weight, Angie decided to change her ways and become sober. She attempted to try to be a good mother to Patty by being supportive during the series, however she left Patty during her Birthday Roast (1.10 - "Banana Heart Banana") and drove off with her mother's ex-boyfriend's car to get out of the country.

characters.name: Bob Barnard
characters.description: BobBorn 22 February 1978Full nameRobert BarnardStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationLawyerNicknameBobFamilyEtta Mae Barnard(ex-wife)Roxy Buckley†(biological daughter)Magnolia Barnard(daughter)Bo Barnard(son)Unborn Baby(possible child)RelationshipEtta Mae Barnard(ex-wife)Bob Armstrong(ex-boyfriend)Coralee Armstrong(one night stand; best friend)Rudy Cruz(ex-boyfriend)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two22 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed byChristopher Gorham Robert "Bob" Barnardis a main character onInsatiable. He is played byChristopher Gorham. Bob was born in Masonville, just like Bob Armstrong. The two were best friends up until their freshmen year of high school, when they went their seperate ways as Barnard became popular and the all american boy, while Armstrong became an overweight outcast. It's soon revealed the reason for their split is because Barnard began gaining feelings for Armstrong, but couldn't act on it due to the times.

characters.name: Coralee Armstrong
characters.description: CoraleeBorn 19 August 1975Full nameCoralee Huggins-ArmstrongStatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationHousewifeowner of a tampon businessFamilyBob Armstrong(ex-husband)Brick Armstrong(son)Cat Armstrong(daughter)Brandylynn Huggens(sister)Robert Armstrong(father-in-law)Delilah(cousin)Three unnamed nephewsRelationshipBob Armstrong(ex-husband)Bob Barnard(one night stand)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two18 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed byAlyssa Milano owner of a tampon business Coralee Huggins Armstrongis a main character onInsatiable. She is played byAlyssa Milano. A Southern socialite, there's more to Coralee than meets the eye. She throughout the series goes to great lengths to hide her lower middle-class trailer park roots, actively social climbing, glad-handing, and pandering to those who have wealth and power. Despite sometimes having these selfish impulses, Coralee is kind at heart and cares deeply about her family.

characters.name: Henry Lee
characters.description: HenryFull nameHenry LeeStatusAliveGenderMaleOccupationPre-law and Pre-med StudentStripperFamilyDixie Sinclair(biological sister)RelationshipPatty Bladell(ex-girlfriend)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesTwo4 of 22First episodeLast episodeFinding MagnoliaPretty in PrisonPortrayed byAlex Landi Henry Leeis a recurring character onInsatiable. He is the biological brother ofDixie Sinclairand isPatty Bladell's boyfriend during part ofSeason 2. Henry is shown to be a good hearted and kind person. He is shown to be just a casual teenager who is completely unaware of who he was dealing with at certain times. Henry is smart but also rebellious, working as a part time stripper as a way to feel comfortable in his own body. Henry is shown to be a good hearted and kind person. He is shown to be just a casual teenager who is completely unaware of who he was dealing with at certain times. characters.description: Kitty Bladellis the twin sister ofPatty Bladell. She was conceived in December 1999 and "eaten" in the womb by her sister, Patty. Her actual name is unknown, as her mother lied and made up a name when asked what it was meant to be.

characters.name: Nonnie Thompson
characters.description: NonnieBorn 17 November 2000Full nameNonnie ThompsonStatusaliveGenderFemaleOccupationStudentpolicewoman (planned on becoming one but its unknown if she suceeded)NicknameDetective DildoFamilyHank Thompson(father)Unnamed(mother; deceased)RelationshipPatty Bladell(ex-crush/best friend)Dee Marshall(ex-girlfriend)Jade(girlfriend)Donald Choi(kissed)Victimsunnamed hitman (hit him with a dildo in order to protect patty because the hitman was trying to kill patty)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two22 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed byKimmy Shields policewoman (planned on becoming one but its unknown if she suceeded)  Kimmy Shields told about Nonnie that she is "a cool chick. She is loyal, funny, clever, and creative. If I say I relate to her it’ll just sound like I’m just bragging about myself, but I would say we share similar qualities in that I always want what’s best for my friends and will do whatever it takes to make them smile."[1]

If I say I relate to her it’ll just sound like I’m just bragging about myself, but I would say we share similar qualities in that I always want what’s best for my friends and will do whatever it takes to make them smile."[1]

characters.name: Patty Bladell
characters.description: Patty BladellBorn: 10 December 2000Full namePatricia BladellStatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationStudentBeauty Pageant ContestantSerial KillerPrison inmate (formerly)VigilanteNicknamePattyFatty PattyMiss American LadyFamilyUnknown(father)Angie Bladell(mother)Kitty Bladell(twin sister)†Edith Bladell(maternal grandmother)Bob Armstrong(godfather)RelationshipJohn(date; murder victim) †Donald Choi(kissed; friend)Brick Armstrong(ex-boyfriend)Christian Keene(ex-boyfriend; accidental victim) †Nonnie Thompson(best friend; kissed)Henry Lee(ex-boyfriend)Bob Armstrong(ex-crush)VictimsJohn(indirect)Christian Keene(defense)Gordy Greer(indirect)3 Drug Dealers(self-defense)Stella Rose Buckley(self-defense)Series informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two22 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed byDebby Ryan Patricia "Patty" Kendall Bladellis the main character onInsatiable. She is played byDebby Ryan. Patty is also the girlfriend ofBrick Armstrongin the first season and half of the second season. She is 17 years old in most of season one, and 18 years old for part of season one and the whole of season two As Patty mentioned herself, she is destructive, not only to herself but also to those close to her. She is usually too honest for her own good as seen by the fact that she ruinedBob Armstrong's life by telling everyone he is having an affair with another man at her birthday roast in "Banana Heart Banana". This may be partially due to her mother,Angie Bladellwho is a bad mother, ignoring her throughout her childhood due to the bullying she received during the time she was overweight. Patty is seen to have psychotic and homicidal tendencies, and her eating is revealed to be a subconscious mechanism of hiding the truth about everything. She also tends to rush into relationships too quickly. Despite this, she is seen to still have some good in her since she is actually more of a vigilante than an evil person. Patty is a bit petty and she is very passionate when it comes to her dreams and what she knows she wants. She is revenge-fueled and ambitious, hard-working to get to the top. Patty's vengeful and very quick to do something that; she might regret later. She grows more intelligent by the end of season one despite not knowing the difference between being a villain and simply being a vigilante who unfortunately murders people and is more cunning as the series continues. Patty is innocent or so she seems and is nothing but a victim of slightly overweight-shaming and bullying. Patty is loyal, sassy, bossy and hot-headed.

characters.name: Regina Sinclair
characters.description: Regina SinclairBorn 11 March 1979StatusAliveGenderFemaleOccupationRealtorCoworker of TampoozleSerial KillerNicknameRe-gina(pronounced like Vagina byCoraleeandBob Armstrong)FamilyDixie Sinclair(adoptive-daughter; kidnapped)RelationshipBrick Armstrongformer affairBob ArmstrongcrushShelbyassociate, ex-affair, accompliceVictimsRoxy GrahamHeather Kristina Pamela Kendall Jackson-Johnson2 Pageant ContestantsPamela Kendall Heather Kristina Jackson-JohnsonSeries informationSeasonsEpisodesOne,Two16 of 22First episodeLast episodePilotThe Most You You Can BePortrayed byArden MyrinRegina Sinclairis a recurring character on the Netflix seriesInsatiable, and the hidden main antagonist of Season 2 as the Pageant Killer. Shelbyassociate, ex-affair, accomplice She is portrayed byArden Myrin. Regina is very mean and constantly tries to make everyone feel bad. She has little empathy and admits she is a "Terrible person". Coralee seems to be the only one Regina has a soft spot for. She even mentions that maybe in another life theyd be best friends.
